build-gate.evidence: tsc --noEmit = 0 errors, npm run build = success (4.99s)

token-drift-scanner.evidence: CSS variables defined in index.css :root — --font-primary (General Sans), --font-display (General Sans), --font-mono (JetBrains Mono). Tailwind config wired: font-sans → var(--font-primary), font-display → var(--font-display), font-mono → var(--font-mono). 0 font-serif in src/. Change one CSS variable = change all fonts site-wide.
